reminders.title: Cancel Xbox Game Pass Ultimate
reminders.description: account.microsoft.com/services → sign in → Game Pass Ultimate → Manage → Cancel. Saves $240/year. Takes 2 minutes. Do not reorganize passwords.

reminders.title: Call GI Associates - check appointment and refill status
reminders.description: GI Associates of Dallas: (214) 555-0845. Check if you have an upcoming appointment or missed one. Ask about omeprazole refill authorization if CVS hasn't filled May yet. Portal: portal.giassociatesdallas.com
